corrections.note: Hyphenated line break in print is after ἀπε-, but transcript joins as ἀπεκατέστησεν without preserving the printed break. If normalization of line-break hyphens is allowed, ignore; otherwise printed form is split across lines.
Transcript has garbled Latin/Greek mix; printed text reads Q\αι δε ἐγκατελιπες Δ.
Printed apparatus reads του θεου, not τον θεου.

corrections.current: οι και ουκ εστιν πλην σου αλλος Q
corrections.correct: και ουκ εστιν πλην σου αλλος Q
corrections.note: Extraneous οι before και; print has only και ουκ εστιν πλην σου αλλος Q.
Accent visible on προφήτου in print.

uncertain.note: The exact rendering of the siglum-plus-latinized note after Q is slightly unclear in the scan; appears as Q\αι δε ἐγκατελιπες Δ, but backslash formatting may reflect transcription convention rather than print.

notes: Running head matches. Body text appears correct apart from possible normalization issue with line-break hyphenation; if editorial policy ignores end-of-line hyphens, body may be fully correct. Apparatus contains several clear transcription errors, especially at 37 and 39/41.
